Package org.eventb.internal.core.upgrade

Class AssignmentUpgrader

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.DefaultSimpleVisitor
org.eventb.internal.core.upgrade.AssignmentUpgrader
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISimpleVisitor, ISimpleVisitor2
class AssignmentUpgrader extends DefaultSimpleVisitor
Upgrades an assignment. It is already known that the assignment needs to be upgraded. This is implemented differently from other kinds of formulas because we cannot rewrite assignments.
